case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. CATHERINE ZHANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZHANG, CATHERINE LUMI WORLDWIDE, INC. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1188 MISSION STREET, #1904 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94103 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, CATHERINE LUMI WORLDWIDE, INC.
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON DEC-30-2024.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES SERVED DEC-17-2014, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, CATHERINE LUMI WORLDWIDE, INC.
